The question is asking to determine how long Tamera Mowry has been doing television. Specifically, it requires calculating the duration from her earliest listed television appearance to the most recent in the provided data. To answer this, we need to sort the "year" column data in the order "small to large" using the f_sort_column(year) operation to identify the earliest and most recent years of her television appearances.

Tamera Mowry's television career started in 1991 with the show "Flesh'n Blood" and has continued through various roles up to at least 2014. To calculate the duration, we subtract the starting year (1991) from the latest year mentioned (2014), which gives us 23 years.

judge_thought:

To calculate the duration:
2014 (most recent year) - 1991 (earliest year) = 23 years.
